# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Secure Self-Hosted Build and Deploy Pipeline

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_preset:
        description: 'Build preset to execute'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'maven-java'
          - 'gradle-java'
          - 'npm-node'
          - 'dotnet-core'
          - 'python-pip'
          - 'go-build'
      deploy_target:
        description: 'Deployment target environment'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'dev'
          - 'staging'
          - 'production'
      project_path:
        description: 'Relative path to project directory (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, slashes only)'
        required: false
        default: '.'
        type: string
      build_args:
        description: 'Additional build arguments (will be validated against allowlist)'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: read
  deployments: write

env:
  ALLOWED_PATH_PATTERN: '^[a-zA-Z0-9._/\-]+$'
  MAX_PATH_DEPTH: 5
  ALLOWED_BUILD_ARGS_PATTERN: '^[a-zA-Z0-9._\-=, ]*$'

jobs:
  validate-inputs:
    name: Validate and Sanitize Inputs
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, validator]
    outputs:
      validated_path: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.project_path }}
      validated_args: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.build_args }}
      build_preset: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.build_preset }}
      deploy_target: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.deploy_target }}
    steps:
      - name: Validate all inputs
        id: validate
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          # Validate project_path - strict allowlist pattern
          PROJECT_PATH="${{ inputs.project_path }}"

          # Reject empty or whitespace-only
          if [[ -z "${PROJECT_PATH// /}" ]]; then
            PROJECT_PATH="."
          fi

          # Check against allowlist pattern (alphanumeric, dots, hyphens, underscores, slashes)
          if ! echo "$PROJECT_PATH" | grep -qE "${{ env.ALLOWED_PATH_PATTERN }}"; then
            echo "::error::Invalid project_path: contains disallowed characters. Only alphanumeric, dots, hyphens, underscores, and slashes are permitted."
            exit 1
          fi

          # Prevent path traversal attacks
          if echo "$PROJECT_PATH" | grep -qE '(\.\./|/\.\.|^\.\.$)'; then
            echo "::error::Invalid project_path: path traversal sequences detected."
            exit 1
          fi

          # Prevent absolute paths
          if [[ "$PROJECT_PATH" == /* ]]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid project_path: absolute paths are not allowed."
            exit 1
          fi

          # Limit path depth
          DEPTH=$(echo "$PROJECT_PATH" | tr '/' '\n' | wc -l)
          if [[ "$DEPTH" -gt "${{ env.MAX_PATH_DEPTH }}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid project_path: exceeds maximum depth of ${{ env.MAX_PATH_DEPTH }}."
            exit 1
          fi

          # Validate build_args against strict allowlist
          BUILD_ARGS="${{ inputs.build_args }}"
          if [[ -n "$BUILD_ARGS" ]]; then
            if ! echo "$BUILD_ARGS" | grep -qE "${{ env.ALLOWED_BUILD_ARGS_PATTERN }}"; then
              echo "::error::Invalid build_args: contains disallowed characters. Only alphanumeric, dots, hyphens, underscores, equals, commas, and spaces are permitted."
              exit 1
            fi

            # Reject any shell metacharacters or injection attempts
            DANGEROUS_PATTERNS='[;|&$`\\(){}<>!#~\x27\x22]'
            if echo "$BUILD_ARGS" | grep -qP "$DANGEROUS_PATTERNS"; then
              echo "::error::Invalid build_args: potentially dangerous characters detected."
              exit 1
            fi

            # Limit length
            if [[ ${#BUILD_ARGS} -gt 256 ]]; then
              echo "::error::Invalid build_args: exceeds maximum length of 256 characters."
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

          # Validate build_preset is in allowlist (defense in depth - GitHub choice should enforce this)
          VALID_PRESETS=("maven-java" "gradle-java" "npm-node" "dotnet-core" "python-pip" "go-build")
          BUILD_PRESET="${{ inputs.build_preset }}"
          PRESET_VALID=false
          for preset in "${VALID_PRESETS[@]}"; do
            if [[ "$BUILD_PRESET" == "$preset" ]]; then
              PRESET_VALID=true
              break
            fi
          done
          if [[ "$PRESET_VALID" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid build_preset: '$BUILD_PRESET' is not in the allowlist."
            exit 1
          fi

          # Validate deploy_target is in allowlist
          VALID_TARGETS=("dev" "staging" "production")
          DEPLOY_TARGET="${{ inputs.deploy_target }}"
          TARGET_VALID=false
          for target in "${VALID_TARGETS[@]}"; do
            if [[ "$DEPLOY_TARGET" == "$target" ]]; then
              TARGET_VALID=true
              break
            fi
          done
          if [[ "$TARGET_VALID" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid deploy_target: '$DEPLOY_TARGET' is not in the allowlist."
            exit 1
          fi

          # Output validated values
          echo "project_path=$PROJECT_PATH" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "build_args=$BUILD_ARGS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "build_preset=$BUILD_PRESET" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "deploy_target=$DEPLOY_TARGET" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          echo "✅ All inputs validated successfully."

  authorization-check:
    name: Authorization Check
    needs: validate-inputs
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, validator]
    steps:
      - name: Verify actor permissions for target environment
        shell: bash
        env:
          DEPLOY_TARGET: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.deploy_target }}
          ACTOR: ${{ github.actor }}
          PROD_DEPLOYERS_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PROD_DEPLOYERS }}
          STAGING_DEPLOYERS_SECRET: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOYERS }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "Checking authorization for actor: $ACTOR to deploy to: $DEPLOY_TARGET"

          if [[ "$DEPLOY_TARGET" == "production" ]]; then
            # Production deployments require explicit authorization
            if [[ -z "$PROD_DEPLOYERS_SECRET" ]]; then
              echo "::error::Production deployers list is not configured. Set the PROD_DEPLOYERS secret."
              exit 1
            fi

            # PROD_DEPLOYERS is a comma-separated list of authorized GitHub usernames stored as a secret
            if ! echo ",$PROD_DEPLOYERS_SECRET," | grep -q ",$ACTOR,"; then
              echo "::error::Actor '$ACTOR' is not authorized for production deployments."
              exit 1
            fi
            echo "✅ Actor authorized for production deployment."

          elif [[ "$DEPLOY_TARGET" == "staging" ]]; then
            if [[ -n "$STAGING_DEPLOYERS_SECRET" ]]; then
              if ! echo ",$STAGING_DEPLOYERS_SECRET," | grep -q ",$ACTOR,"; then
                echo "::error::Actor '$ACTOR' is not authorized for staging deployments."
                exit 1
              fi
            fi
            echo "✅ Actor authorized for staging deployment."

          else
            echo "✅ Dev deployments are open to repository collaborators."
          fi

  build:
    name: Build (${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_preset }})
    needs: [validate-inputs, authorization-check]
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, builder]
    timeout-minutes: 30
    env:
      BUILD_PRESET: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_preset }}
      PROJECT_PATH: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.validated_path }}
      BUILD_ARGS: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.validated_args }}
    steps:
      - name: Clean workspace
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          # Clean previous build artifacts to prevent contamination on self-hosted runners
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/*
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/.[!.]*
          echo "✅ Workspace cleaned."

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Verify project path exists
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          FULL_PATH="$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/$PROJECT_PATH"

          # Resolve the real path and ensure it's within the workspace
          RESOLVED_PATH=$(realpath -m "$FULL_PATH")
          RESOLVED_WORKSPACE=$(realpath "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE")

          if [[ "$RESOLVED_PATH" != "$RESOLVED_WORKSPACE"* ]]; then
            echo "::error::Resolved project path escapes the workspace directory."
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ ! -d "$FULL_PATH" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Project path '$PROJECT_PATH' does not exist in the repository."
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "✅ Project path verified: $PROJECT_PATH"

      - name: Execute build preset
        shell: bash
        working-directory: ${{ env.PROJECT_PATH }}
        env:
          # Secrets are passed as environment variables, never interpolated into shell commands
          MAVEN_SETTINGS_XML: ${{ secrets.MAVEN_SETTINGS_XML }}
          NPM_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
          NUGET_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.NUGET_API_KEY }}
          PYPI_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PYPI_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          # Mask any secrets that might appear in logs
          if [[ -n "${NPM_TOKEN:-}" ]]; then echo "::add-mask::$NPM_TOKEN"; fi
          if [[ -n "${NUGET_API_KEY:-}" ]]; then echo "::add-mask::$NUGET_API_KEY"; fi
          if [[ -n "${PYPI_TOKEN:-}" ]]; then echo "::add-mask::$PYPI_TOKEN"; fi

          echo "Executing build preset: $BUILD_PRESET"
          echo "Working directory: $(pwd)"

          # Use a predefined, audited build script per preset
          # These scripts are checked into the repository under .github/build-scripts/
          # and are NOT user-provided - they are maintained by the platform team
          BUILD_SCRIPT="$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/.github/build-scripts/${BUILD_PRESET}.sh"

          if [[ ! -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Build script not found for preset '$BUILD_PRESET'. Ensure .github/build-scripts/${BUILD_PRESET}.sh exists."
            exit 1
          fi

          # Verify the build script is owned by the repository (not symlinked outside)
          RESOLVED_SCRIPT=$(realpath "$BUILD_SCRIPT")
          RESOLVED_WORKSPACE=$(realpath "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE")
          if [[ "$RESOLVED_SCRIPT" != "$RESOLVED_WORKSPACE"* ]]; then
            echo "::error::Build script resolves outside the workspace. Possible symlink attack."
            exit 1
          fi

          # Execute the predefined build script with validated args passed as a single env var
          # The build script reads BUILD_ARGS from the environment - never injected into shell
          export VALIDATED_BUILD_ARGS="$BUILD_ARGS"
          bash "$BUILD_SCRIPT"

          echo "✅ Build completed successfully."

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ${{ env.PROJECT_PATH }}/build-output/
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: error

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scan
    needs: [validate-inputs, build]
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, scanner]
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ./build-output/

      - name: Run security scan
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "Running security scan on build artifacts..."

          # Execute the platform team's security scanning script
          SCAN_SCRIPT="$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/.github/build-scripts/security-scan.sh"

          if [[ -f "$SCAN_SCRIPT" ]]; then
            RESOLVED_SCRIPT=$(realpath "$SCAN_SCRIPT")
            RESOLVED_WORKSPACE=$(realpath "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE")
            if [[ "$RESOLVED_SCRIPT" != "$RESOLVED_WORKSPACE"* ]]; then
              echo "::error::Security scan script resolves outside workspace."
              exit 1
            fi
            bash "$SCAN_SCRIPT" ./build-output/
          else
            echo "::warning::No security scan script found at .github/build-scripts/security-scan.sh. Skipping scan."
          fi

          echo "✅ Security scan completed."

  deploy:
    name: Deploy to ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.deploy_target }}
    needs: [validate-inputs, build, security-scan]
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, deployer]
    timeout-minutes: 20
    environment:
      name: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.deploy_target }}
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.deploy_target }}
      cancel-in-progress: false
    env:
      DEPLOY_TARGET: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.deploy_target }}
      BUILD_PRESET: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_preset }}
    steps:
      - name: Clean workspace
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/*
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/.[!.]*

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ./build-output/

      - name: Execute deployment
        shell: bash
        env:
          # Deployment credentials are stored as GitHub secrets and passed via environment
          DEPLOY_SSH_KEY: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_SSH_KEY }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          KUBECONFIG_DATA: ${{ secrets.KUBECONFIG_DATA }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          # Mask all sensitive values
          if [[ -n "${DEPLOY_SSH_KEY:-}" ]]; then echo "::add-mask::$DEPLOY_SSH_KEY"; fi
          if [[ -n "${DEPLOY_HOST:-}" ]]; then echo "::add-mask::$DEPLOY_HOST"; fi
          if [[ -n "${DEPLOY_TOKEN:-}" ]]; then echo "::add-mask::$DEPLOY_TOKEN"; fi

          echo "Deploying to environment: $DEPLOY_TARGET"
          echo "Build preset: $BUILD_PRESET"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}"

          # Use predefined deployment scripts maintained by the platform team
          DEPLOY_SCRIPT="$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/.github/deploy-scripts/${DEPLOY_TARGET}.sh"

          if [[ ! -f "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Deployment script not found for target '$DEPLOY_TARGET'. Ensure .github/deploy-scripts/${DEPLOY_TARGET}.sh exists."
            exit 1
          fi

          # Verify script is within workspace
          RESOLVED_SCRIPT=$(realpath "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT")
          RESOLVED_WORKSPACE=$(realpath "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE")
          if [[ "$RESOLVED_SCRIPT" != "$RESOLVED_WORKSPACE"* ]]; then
            echo "::error::Deployment script resolves outside the workspace."
            exit 1
          fi

          # Set up SSH key securely if provided
          if [[ -n "${DEPLOY_SSH_KEY:-}" ]]; then
            mkdir -p ~/.ssh
            chmod 700 ~/.ssh
            echo "$DEPLOY_SSH_KEY" > ~/.ssh/deploy_key
            chmod 600 ~/.ssh/deploy_key
            # Ensure strict host key checking
            echo "StrictHostKeyChecking yes" >> ~/.ssh/config
            chmod 600 ~/.ssh/config
          fi

          # Set up kubeconfig securely if provided
          if [[ -n "${KUBECONFIG_DATA:-}" ]]; then
            KUBECONFIG_DIR=$(mktemp -d)
            echo "$KUBECONFIG_DATA" > "$KUBECONFIG_DIR/config"
            chmod 600 "$KUBECONFIG_DIR/config"
            export KUBECONFIG="$KUBECONFIG_DIR/config"
          fi

          # Execute the deployment script
          export ARTIFACT_PATH="$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/build-output"
          bash "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"

          echo "✅ Deployment to $DEPLOY_TARGET completed successfully."

      - name: Cleanup sensitive files
        if: always()
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          # Always clean up sensitive files from the self-hosted runner
          rm -f ~/.ssh/deploy_key
          rm -f ~/.ssh/config
          rm -rf /tmp/kubeconfig-*
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/*
          rm -rf "$GITHUB_WORKSPACE"/.[!.]*
          echo "✅ Sensitive files cleaned up."

  audit-log:
    name: Audit Log
    needs: [validate-inputs, deploy]
    if: always()
    runs-on: [self-hosted, linux, validator]
    steps:
      - name: Record audit entry
        shell: bash
        env:
          AUDIT_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.AUDIT_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          if [[ -n "${AUDIT_WEBHOOK_URL:-}" ]]; then
            echo "::add-mask::$AUDIT_WEBHOOK_URL"
          fi

          TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
          DEPLOY_STATUS="${{ needs.deploy.result }}"

          AUDIT_ENTRY=$(cat <<EOF
          {
            "timestamp": "$TIMESTAMP",
            "actor": "${{ github.actor }}",
            "repository": "${{ github.repository }}",
            "run_id": "${{ github.run_id }}",
            "build_preset": "${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_preset }}",
            "deploy_target": "${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.deploy_target }}",
            "project_path": "${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.validated_path }}",
            "deploy_status": "$DEPLOY_STATUS",
            "ref": "${{ github.ref }}",
            "sha": "${{ github.sha }}"
          }
          EOF
          )

          echo "📋 Audit Entry:"
          echo "$AUDIT_ENTRY"

          # Send to audit webhook if configured
          if [[ -n "${AUDIT_WEBHOOK_URL:-}" ]]; then
            curl --fail --silent --show-error \
              --max-time 30 \
              --retry 3 \
              -X POST \
              -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
              -d "$AUDIT_ENTRY" \
              "$AUDIT_WEBHOOK_URL" || echo "::warning::Failed to send audit log to webhook."
          fi

          echo "✅ Audit entry recorded."
